name: Breyers
cat: Food & Beverages / Ice Cream & Frozen Desserts

political.s: Breyers is owned by The Magnum Ice Cream Company, a subsidiary of Unilever until July 2025. Limited specific PAC or direct political contribution data is available for the Breyers brand itself as a subsidiary.

charity.s: Breyers supports various charitable causes, primarily focusing on sustainable farming, community enrichment, and family-oriented initiatives. The company participates in programs supporting children's education and health, and has committed to sustainable vanilla sourcing through partnerships with the Rainforest Alliance that benefit approximately 4,000 farmers.
charity.focus: Sustainable agriculture, children's education and health, community enrichment

environment.s: Breyers has made commitments to sustainable sourcing, particularly for vanilla and fruit ingredients through Rainforest Alliance partnerships. The company uses 100% sustainably sourced vanilla and supports farmer communities through education and health initiatives. However, ingredient reformulations have included less sustainable practices in recent years, and some raw materials like raspberries may not meet sustainable farming standards.

labor.s: Limited public data available on Breyers-specific labor practices. As a subsidiary of Unilever/The Magnum Ice Cream Company, the brand follows parent company labor standards. No major OSHA violations or NLRB complaints specific to Breyers were found in available sources.

dei.s: No specific DEI policy or public commitments found for Breyers brand. Parent company Unilever has general diversity commitments, but Breyers-specific DEI initiatives are not publicly documented.

animals.s: N/A - Breyers is a food product company and does not conduct animal testing. The brand focuses on ice cream and frozen dessert production.

guns.s: N/A - Breyers is an ice cream manufacturer with no involvement in firearms sales or manufacturing.

privacy.s: As part of The Magnum Ice Cream Company and Unilever, Breyers maintains privacy policies compliant with GDPR and other data protection regulations. Limited specific privacy incident data is publicly available.

execPay.s: Executive compensation data is not separately disclosed for Breyers as a brand subsidiary. Data would be rolled up into The Magnum Ice Cream Company or Unilever corporate filings.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
